text: What is something small I do that makes your day a bit better?
What is one of your favorite memories of us from the last year?
When do you feel most connected to me during a normal week?
What is one small habit we could add to our week to feel closer?
How do you like to be comforted when you’ve had a tough day?
What is something you appreciate about our daily routine together?
What is one thing you’d like us to do more often as a couple?
What is a simple moment with me that you’ve enjoyed recently?
How can I better support you in your current season of life?
What is something you’re looking forward to with me this month?
What do you think we do really well as a couple right now?
When do you feel most understood by me?
What is one way our relationship has changed you for the better?
How do you like us to handle disagreements when they come up?
What is something you wish we talked about a little more often?
What helps you feel emotionally safe with me?
What is one hope you have for our relationship in the next year?
What is a value you try to live by that you’d like me to understand better?
Growing up, what shaped the way you think about love and commitment?
What is something you rarely talk about but feel comfortable sharing with me?
When do you feel most proud of the person you are?
What is a personal dream or goal you’d love me to cheer you on in?
What is something you’ve learned about yourself in the last few years?
How would you like our relationship to support the person you are becoming?
